neighborhoods.name: Limerick City Centre
neighborhoods.description: Compact center with King John's Castle, the Georgian quarter, and the revitalized Milk Market district
neighborhoods.character: Historic compact, revitalizing, castle and river

housing.predominantType: Georgian townhouse apartments and city-center flats

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Limerick. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Castletroy / University Area
neighborhoods.description: Eastern suburb near University of Limerick with modern development and the Plassey technology park
neighborhoods.character: University suburban, modern, tech employment area

housing.predominantType: Modern estate houses and student-area apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Limerick's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Moyross / Southill
neighborhoods.description: Regenerating northern and southern estates with improving infrastructure and affordable housing

housing.predominantType: Social and private housing, newer regeneration builds

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Adare
neighborhoods.description: Picture-perfect thatched village 15 minutes from the city, repeatedly voted Ireland's prettiest village
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
